response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong engineering seniority (Staff level, TypeScript expertise, cloud infrastructure knowledge) and current engagement with GenAI tools (MCP code generators at re:cinq), he does not meet the core requirement of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions. His AI experience is nascent (2 months at current role), and the resume lacks evidence of critical required qualifications: Python expertise, vector databases, RAG architectures, data pipelines for ML, and deep specialization in production AI systems. He appears to be a strong engineer transitioning into AI, not an established AI systems expert.
strengths: Current hands-on GenAI/MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq demonstrates cutting-edge technical engagement with relevant frameworks
Proven Staff-level seniority with full-stack capabilities spanning infrastructure, cloud platforms (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes), and mentoring
Strong TypeScript expertise across multiple production roles, one of the two primary languages for the position
concerns: Does not meet minimum 8-year AI production experience requirement; AI-specific work limited to 2 months at current role
No Python expertise documented despite being a primary language for the role; missing vector database, RAG, and ML pipeline experience
Career trajectory shows generalist background across web, mobile, and infrastructure rather than deep specialization in production AI systems

key_factors.factor: Missing Python and core AI tech stack (vector DBs, RAG, LangGraph)
Current GenAI/MCP infrastructure role shows appropriate technical direction
